recommendations.title: The Fearless Vampire Killers
recommendations.overview: A noted professor and his dim-witted apprentice fall prey to their inquiring vampires, while on the trail of the ominous damsel in distress.

recommendations.title: Black as Night
recommendations.overview: A teenage girl with self-esteem issues finds confidence in the most unlikely way, by spending her summer battling vampires that prey on New Orleans' disenfranchised with the help of her best friend, the boy she's always pined for, and a peculiar rich

recommendations.title: School Is Over
recommendations.overview: Agathe Langlois, Parisian until the end of the nails well varnishes, is delighted: she is going to be confirmed as a professor of English. The happiness of the good news will not last as she learns that she is deployed to the countryside.

recommendations.title: And Soon the Darkness
recommendations.overview: Two young English women go on a cycling tour of the French countryside. When one of them goes missing, the other begins to search for her. But who can she trust?

recommendations.title: The Living Dead at Manchester Morgue
recommendations.overview: When a series of murders hit the remote English countryside, a detective suspects a pair of travelers when it is actually the work of the undead, jarred back to life by an experimental ultra-sonic radiation machine used by the Ministry of Agriculture

recommendations.title: Blade
recommendations.overview: The Daywalker known as "Blade" - a half-vampire, half-mortal man - becomes the protector of humanity against an underground army of vampires.

recommendations.title: Vamp
recommendations.overview: Two fraternity pledges go to a sleazy bar in search of a stripper for their college friends, unaware it is occupied by vampires.

recommendations.title: Burnt Offerings
recommendations.overview: A family moves into a large old mansion in the countryside which seems to have a mysterious and sinister power over its new residents.

recommendations.title: From the Dark
recommendations.overview: A couple on a trip through the Irish countryside find themselves hunted by a creature who only attacks at night.

recommendations.title: Blood: The Last Vampire
recommendations.overview: In Japan, the vampire-hunter Saya, who is a powerful original, is sent by her liaison with the government, David, posed as a teenage student to the Yokota High School on the eve of Halloween to hunt down vampires. Saya asks David to give a new katana
